title: cyperus subanceps
intro: Cyperus subanceps, also known as the lesser umbrella sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the sedge family and is commonly found in wetlands and marshy areas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cyperus subanceps include the relief of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Cyperus subanceps can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
